_scoring_notes.kinetic_formula: 40% intercept rate (scaled 90-100% → 0-100) + 20% absolute debris penalty (100 - debris*8) + 20% day-over-day trend (100 - delta*10) + 20% 7-day avg trend (100 - delta*10)
_scoring_notes.social_formula: Base 100. Deductions: -5 per NCEMA alert in last 24h, -5 US embassy partial advisory, -5 AUH partial restriction, -10 per full embassy departure advisory, -10 per airport closure

dailyBriefing: On March 21, UAE air defences successfully intercepted all 4 ballistic missiles and 26 UAVs launched from Iran, achieving a 100% intercept rate. Only one minor incident was reported involving debris striking a building facade, and the overall debris count dropped significantly from the previous day. Infrastructure remains stable with supermarkets and fuel stations fully operational, while regional allies have expressed strong support for UAE security measures.

schoolClosures.label: Normal Operations
schoolClosures.guidance: Schools and government offices are operating on regular schedules.

supermarketStock.label: Adequate Stock
supermarketStock.guidance: All major chains fully stocked. Normal shopping advised.
